subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise beseemeth and is meet for the Lord of Divine Proof, the All-Merciful, through Whose lights the world of being hath been illumined [3.5s]... ...His holiness the exalted Bab because of the weakness of the people at the inception of his manifestation showed extreme forbearance
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از بیان برهان حضرت رحمن را لایق و سزاست که از انوارش عالم امکان
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @acting according to the exigencies of the day; pragmatism, @Manifestation of God as divine physician, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @chastisement and requital, @station of the Manifestation of God, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement
